description: API to retrieve Put / Call Ratio (PCR) timeseries for a given ticker based on options data. Try it out! You can test the API with the trial key TEST. Simply include it in your request headers; either here, or add the header "Ortex-Api-Key": "TEST" to your http request. Trial key restrictions: A list of randomly selected rows will be returned Get full access! Get a key at app.ortex.com/apis

output.message: No data returned for the given query parameters
